wordplay_note: From Fink to Frink — renaming to escape Jewish persecution
card_description: Frank Frink (meaning "Frink = free; born Fink (informer)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Man in the High Castle*. Jewish-American artisan hiding his identity in Japanese-occupied San Francisco. Name note: From Fink to Frink — renaming to escape Jewish persecution. Authentic craft versus mass production — creating real art under totalitarianism. First appears in *The Man in the High Castle*.
first_work: The Man in the High Castle
work_list: The Man in the High Castle
